title: BEM-794 real response filter
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:18 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
real=[]; blockers=[]
d=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if d.exists():
    for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            is_blocker='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not fake' in low or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            has_decision='DECISION:' in up and ('APPROVED' in up or 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up or 'BLOCKED' in up)
            has_claude_marker='CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up or 'Claude Internal Auditor' in txt
            item={'path':str(p),'has_decision':has_decision,'preview':txt[:600]}
            if is_blocker: blockers.append(item)
            elif has_decision and has_claude_marker: real.append(item)
status='real_claude_response_present' if real else 'real_claude_response_missing'
next_action='process real Claude response' if real else 'continue runtime dispatch repair; do not accept blocker files as Claude answer'
state={'bem':'BEM-794','status':status,'real_responses':real[-10:],'blocker_files':blockers[-10:],'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem794_filter_real_claude_response.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem794_filter_real_claude_response.md').write_text('# BEM-794 | Filter Real Claude Response | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem794_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-794'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem794_filter_real_claude_response.json','governance/reports/bem794_filter_real_claude_response.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem794_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Filtered claude_to_gpt files to distinguish real Claude response from blocker/fallback files')
"""
No issue comments.
